hero.subtitle: DFMG PLATFORM
hero.title: Replace five tools with one system built for your industry
hero.body: Scheduling, invoicing, payroll, client portals, and CRM — purpose-built for Danish cleaning and service companies. Save hours every week and never lose track of a job again.
hero.placeholder_hint: Recommended: 60s Loom walkthrough or animated dashboard GIF

proof.text: Used daily by DFMG to manage [X] employees across [X] client locations

why.subtitle: WHY DFMG
why.title: Built by a cleaning company, not a software company
why.body: We run our own facility service business on this platform every day. Every feature exists because we needed it — not because a product manager imagined it. When you call with a question, we can answer instantly because we use the same system.
why.card1_desc: eIndkomst, SKAT, e-Faktura, Danish holiday law, NemKonto — compliance built in from day one, not bolted on like international tools.
why.card2_desc: Start with scheduling and invoicing. Add payroll, CRM, and accounting when you're ready. Only pay for what you use.
why.card3_desc: When an employee logs hours, it flows into invoicing, payroll, profitability analytics, and client reports. No re-entry, no sync issues.

modules.subtitle: MODULES
modules.title: One platform, every part of your business
modules.body: Six capability areas, 40+ modules — replacing spreadsheets, WhatsApp groups, and disconnected tools.
modules.operations_desc: Schedule jobs, track time, manage quality inspections, and see who's where — all in real time from your phone or desktop.
modules.clients_desc: Give clients their own portal with upcoming tasks, invoices, and photos. Build location guides so every cleaner knows the job.
modules.employees_desc: Employee app for tasks and schedules. Holiday requests, performance tracking, handbook, and tests — all self-service.
modules.finance_desc: Full Danish accounting with e-Faktura, bank reconciliation, BankConnect, VAT reports — no need for a separate accounting system.
modules.crm_desc: Build professional offers with PDF export, automate outreach emails, track leads, and manage your inbox — win more contracts.
modules.documents_desc: Auto-fill document templates, collect e-signatures, and track KPIs — see profitability per client and per employee.

walkthrough.title: See how it works in practice
walkthrough.body: From scheduling a job to sending the invoice — follow a real workflow through the platform. No slides, no mockups — this is the actual system we use every day.
walkthrough.placeholder_hint: 2-3 min: Schedule task → Employee checks in → Client sees report → Invoice sent

comparison.title: Stop duct-taping tools together
comparison.body: Most service companies use 5-8 disconnected systems. DFMG Platform replaces them all.
without_items: Client updates via email and phone
No overview, no connection between systems
with_items: One calendar for all jobs and employees
Danish payroll with eIndkomst built in
Clients see everything in their own portal
Employees use the app for tasks and updates

integrations.subtitle: INTEGRATIONS
integrations.title: Works with the tools you already use

cta.title: Ready to run your business from one place?
cta.body: Book a 30-minute demo. We'll show you the modules that matter most to your business — using real data from our own operation.

hero.subtitle: DFMG PLATFORM
hero.title: Erstat fem værktøjer med ét system bygget til jeres branche
hero.body: Planlægning, fakturering, løn, kundeportaler og CRM — specialbygget til danske rengørings- og servicevirksomheder. Spar timer hver uge og mist aldrig overblikket over en opgave.

proof.text: Bruges dagligt af DFMG til at styre [X] medarbejdere på tværs af [X] kundeplaceringer

why.subtitle: HVORFOR DFMG
why.title: Bygget af en rengøringsvirksomhed, ikke et softwarefirma
why.body: Vi driver vores egen facility service-virksomhed på denne platform hver dag. Alle funktioner findes, fordi vi selv havde brug for dem — ikke fordi en produktchef forestillede sig dem. Når I ringer med et spørgsmål, kan vi svare med det samme, fordi vi bruger det samme system.
why.card1_desc: eIndkomst, SKAT, e-Faktura, dansk ferielov, NemKonto — compliance er indbygget fra dag ét, ikke tilføjet efterfølgende som i internationale værktøjer.
why.card2_desc: Start med planlægning og fakturering. Tilføj løn, CRM og bogføring, når I er klar. Betal kun for det I bruger.
why.card3_desc: Når en medarbejder registrerer timer, flyder det videre til fakturering, løn, rentabilitetsanalyser og kunderapporter. Ingen genindtastning, ingen synkproblemer.

modules.subtitle: MODULER
modules.title: Én platform, alle dele af jeres forretning
modules.body: Seks kompetenceområder, 40+ moduler — erstatter regneark, WhatsApp-grupper og usammenhængende værktøjer.
modules.operations_desc: Planlæg opgaver, registrer tid, håndtér kvalitetsinspektioner og se hvem der er hvor — alt i realtid fra telefon eller computer.
modules.clients_desc: Giv kunderne deres egen portal med kommende opgaver, fakturaer og fotos. Byg lokationsguider så enhver rengøringsmedarbejder kender opgaven.
modules.employees_desc: Medarbejder-app til opgaver og vagtplaner. Ferieanmodninger, performancetracking, håndbog og tests — alt selvbetjening.
modules.finance_desc: Fuld dansk bogføring med e-Faktura, bankafstemning, BankConnect, momsrapporter — intet behov for et separat regnskabssystem.
modules.crm_desc: Byg professionelle tilbud med PDF-eksport, automatisér outreach-emails, følg leads og håndtér jeres indbakke — vind flere kontrakter.
modules.documents_desc: Auto-udfyld dokumentskabeloner, indsaml e-signaturer og følg KPI'er — se rentabilitet per kunde og per medarbejder.

walkthrough.title: Se hvordan det fungerer i praksis
walkthrough.body: Fra planlægning af en opgave til afsendelse af fakturaen — følg et reelt workflow gennem platformen. Ingen slides, ingen mockups — dette er det faktiske system vi bruger hver dag.
walkthrough.placeholder_hint: 2-3 min: Planlæg opgave → Medarbejder tjekker ind → Kunden ser rapport → Faktura sendt
